mapper.select:
SELECT M1.ID, M1.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, M1.SHIP_NAME, M1.SHIP_NAME_EN, M1.SHORTHAND_CODE, M1.SHIP_KIND_CODE, M1.NATION_CODE, M1.SHIP_TYPE_CODE, M1.IMO, M1.MMSI, M1.CALL_NO, M1.SHIP_LENGTH, M1.SHIP_WIDTH, M1.SHIP_HEIGHT, M1.SELF_WEIGHT, M1.NET_WEIGHT, M1.TOTAL_WEIGHT, M1.HATCH_NUM, M1.CABIN_LAYER_NUM, M1.DWT, M1.CABIN_VOLUME, M1.HATCH_SIZE, M1.MAX_SPEED, M1.SPEED, M1.MOULDED_DEPTH, M1.HANGER_NUM, M1.CABIN_TYPE, M1.HANGER_LOAD, M1.HATCH_COVER_TYPE_CODE, M1.HANGER_LOCATION, M1.CAPTAIN_PHONE, M1.CAPTAIN_NAME, M1.BUILT_YM, M1.WATER_VOLUME, M1.SURPLUS_WATER_DEPTH, M1.FULL_LOAD_WATER, M1.EMPTY_LOAD_WATER, M1.HEADER_COCKPIT_DISTANCE, M1.STATUS, M1.CREATE_BY, M1.CREATE_BY_NAME, M1.CREATE_TIME, M1.APPROVAL_BY, M1.APPROVAL_NAME, M1.APPROVAL_TIME, M1.UPDATE_BY, M1.UPDATE_BY_NAME, M1.UPDATE_TIME, F.DICT_LABEL AS NATION_LABEL, M1.LAST_TIME, M1.APPLICATION_UNIT, M1.APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE, M1.IS_FOCUS_SHIP, M1.IS_BLACK_SHIP FROM M_SHIP_BLACK M1 left join M_DICT_DATA F ON M1.NATION_CODE=F.DICT_VALUE and F.DICT_TYPE='NATION'
M1.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO M_SHIP_BLACK( ID, BO_HAI_TONG_ID, SHIP_NAME, SHIP_NAME_EN, SHORTHAND_CODE, SHIP_KIND_CODE, NATION_CODE, SHIP_TYPE_CODE, IMO, MMSI, CALL_NO, SHIP_LENGTH, SHIP_WIDTH, SHIP_HEIGHT, SELF_WEIGHT, NET_WEIGHT, TOTAL_WEIGHT, HATCH_NUM, CABIN_LAYER_NUM, DWT, CABIN_VOLUME, HATCH_SIZE, MAX_SPEED, SPEED, MOULDED_DEPTH, HANGER_NUM, CABIN_TYPE, HANGER_LOAD, HATCH_COVER_TYPE_CODE, HANGER_LOCATION, CAPTAIN_PHONE, CAPTAIN_NAME, BUILT_YM, WATER_VOLUME, SURPLUS_WATER_DEPTH, FULL_LOAD_WATER, EMPTY_LOAD_WATER, HEADER_COCKPIT_DISTANCE, STATUS, CERTIFICATE_PATH, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, APPLICATION_UNIT, APPLICATION_UNIT_CODE, IS_FOCUS_SHIP, IS_BLACK_SHIP )VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{boHaiTongId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{shipName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipNameEn, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shorthandCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipKindCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{nationCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{mmsi, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{callNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shipLength, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{shipWidth, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{shipHeight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{selfWeight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{netWeight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{totalWeight, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{hatchNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cabinLayerNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dwt, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{cabinVolume, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{hatchSize, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{maxSpeed, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{speed, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{mouldedDepth, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{hangerNum, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{cabinType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hangerLoad, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hatchCoverTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hangerLocation, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{captainPhone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{captainName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{builtYm, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{waterVolume, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{surplusWaterDepth, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{fullLoadWater, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{emptyLoadWater, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{headerCockpitDistance, jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{certificatePath, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{loginUserId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{loginUserName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{now}, #{applicationUnit,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{applicationUnitCode,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{isFocusShip,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{isBlackShip,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
